calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 20, 1995, is admitted to probate. Gregory V. Gershkovich is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 9, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. No appearance is required if either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is to be filed two weeks prior to the hearing date. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: H. Singh. Not reported.
